title: Pipeline stepper UX overhaul: icons, actions, history, cross-page
description: Complete frontend overhaul with design prototype, step icons, action buttons, history, and cross-page integration

out: Full PipelineStepper in game panel (style conflict)

tasks.title: Visual prototype of pipeline stepper redesign
tasks.user_scenario: CEO opens dashboard in Chrome MCP and reviews a working visual prototype of the new stepper before production code is written.
tasks.scope: Create a standalone prototype page with hardcoded mock data showing all visual elements.

dod.criterion: Route or page renders full vertical timeline with at least 8 distinct step icons from stepIconMap
At least 2 steps render in skipped state with SkipForward icon, strikethrough, 50% opacity, dashed connector
At least 1 step renders inline action banner with visible approve/reject button
Artifact links render as clickable spans with copy-to-clipboard affordance
Collapsible Recent Directives history section with 3+ mock entries showing title, status badge, timestamp

tasks.title: Step-specific icons and skipped-step visuals in PipelineStepper
tasks.user_scenario: CEO views active directive and recognizes each step by its unique icon, with skipped steps clearly distinguished.
tasks.scope: Implement stepIconMap in PipelineStepper.tsx. Add skipped-step rendering.

dod.criterion: stepIconMap maps all 14 pipeline steps to distinct Lucide icons
Skipped steps render with SkipForward, strikethrough, 50% opacity, dashed connector
Directive title (not slug) displays in stepper header
No regressions in existing step status rendering (completed, active, pending)

tasks.title: CEO action banners and clickable artifact links
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees directive waiting for approval and can act directly from stepper, and can click artifact paths to copy them.
tasks.scope: Add inline action banners for needsAction steps. Add clickable artifact links with copy-to-clipboard.

dod.criterion: needsAction steps render visible action banner with contextual text and styled button
Action banners appear for approve, completion, and challenge steps when needsAction is true
Artifact file paths render as clickable spans with pointer cursor and visual affordance
Clicking artifact path copies full path to clipboard with visual confirmation

tasks.title: Directive history section with recent completed directives
tasks.user_scenario: CEO scrolls below active pipeline and sees collapsible list of recently completed directives with outcomes.
tasks.scope: Add collapsible Recent Directives section to DirectiveProgress.tsx.

dod.criterion: Collapsible Recent Directives section renders below active stepper, defaults collapsed
Each entry shows title (not slug), color-coded status badge, formatted timestamp
Entries sourced from workState.conductor.directives, limited to 10 most recent
Section expands/collapses with smooth animation

tasks.title: Fix Projects page stepper and game panel compact summary
tasks.user_scenario: CEO navigates to Projects page and sees polished stepper, then Game view shows compact step summary without style conflicts.
tasks.scope: Update DirectivePipeline.tsx with redesigned stepper. Game panel compact summary with inline hex styles.

dod.criterion: DirectivePipeline.tsx renders updated PipelineStepper with icons, skipped, actions
Game ProjectsPanel renders compact single-line step summary using inline styles with hex constants
No Tailwind class strings in game panel stepper rendering code
npm run type-check passes across all modified files
All 14 pipeline steps have distinct lucide icons
Skipped steps visually distinct from pending (SkipForward, strikethrough, dimmed)
needsAction steps show inline approve/reject buttons
Directive history section shows completed directives below active stepper
Projects page and Game UI both show pipeline progress without style conflicts
